_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Colic may be associated with Fever, Nausea and vomiting
Presence of renal stone >20 mm as shown by IVP / NCCT/CT-IVP

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes- detailed history, signs & symptoms, indication for procedure documented?
IVP / NCCT/CT-IVP Showing presence of stone?
IVP / NCCT/CT-IVP Showing presence of renal stone >20 mm?

cpd_claim.q: Detailed operative notes with indications and outcomes of the procedure provided?
Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge provided?
X-ray / USG post procedure showing the procedure done provided?

common_queries: IVP / NCCT/CT-IVP showing presence of renal stone not provided or stone size < 20 mm
Clinical notes detailing history, signs & symptoms, and indication for procedure missing at pre-authorization
Operative notes with indications and outcomes of the procedure missing at claim submission
Detailed Discharge Summary missing at claim submission
X-ray / USG post procedure missing at claim submission

clinical_key_pointers: Colic may be associated with Fever, Nausea and vomiting
